proposed_artifacts.content:
## Evidence Map for napier-accommodation-arrears (T-005)

### Sources Reviewed
- None provided in this work order.

### Key Gaps
- No tenancy agreement, arrears ledger, correspondence, or notice documents were available.
- No legal memory entries were available.

### Relevant Authorities (not yet applied)
- Private Housing (Tenancies) (Scotland) Act 2016, schedule 1 (excludes student accommodation)
- Housing (Scotland) Act 1988, s.12 and schedule 4 (assured tenancy exclusions)
- Housing (Scotland) Act 2001, s.7 (minimum notice)
- Equality Act 2010, ss.20, 21, 91 (reasonable adjustments, discrimination)
- Scottish Public Services Ombudsman Act 2002 (complaint jurisdiction)

### Next Steps
- Search matter source repository for arrears-related documents.
- Search legal memory for prior findings or procedural history.
